# UC-14.10.10 · Aranet Temperature Gradient Across Adjacent Zones

## Description

Large intra-floor gradients reveal blocked vents, failed VAVs, or hot spots over racks.

## Value

Protects IT loads and improves comfort uniformity.

## Implementation

(1) Normalize zone naming. (2) Threshold °C span. (3) Visual floor plan overlay.

## SPL

```spl
index=environment sourcetype="aranet:sensor" earliest=-4h
| eval temp=tonumber(coalesce(temp_c, ""))
| eval zone=coalesce(location, zone, "")
| stats latest(temp) as temp_c by zone
| eventstats range(temp_c) as building_span
| where building_span>5
```

## Visualization

Heatmap; table gradient.

## References

- [Aranet — environmental monitoring](https://aranet.com/)
- [ASHRAE — IAQ](https://www.ashrae.org/)
- [OSHA indoor air](https://www.osha.gov/indoor-air-quality)
